items.briefing:
Australian organisations have been warned that quantum computing poses a growing threat to current encryption standards, meaning data protected today could potentially be decrypted in the future as the technology matures. Separately, with the FIFA World Cup approaching, the FBI is warning of fake official-looking websites designed to steal money and personal details from fans buying tickets or merchandise — Australians should be cautious about any World Cup-related sites they haven't verified as legitimate.

**Practical tip:** Before purchasing anything World Cup-related online, check the website address carefully and only buy through official FIFA channels.

featured.title: Australia warned over quantum cyber security risks
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure faces years-long vulnerability to quantum computing threats.
